name: Fluffy Pumpkin Pie
recipeIngredient: Favorite pie crust (2 cans, 16 oz each)
1 cup heavy whipping cream or whole milk
recipeInstructions:
1. Roll pastry into two 11-inch circles on a lightly floured surface. Place in two 9-inch pie plates and flute edges to form a high rim.
2. Refrigerate for 30 minutes.
3. Preheat oven to 450°F (232°C).
4. In a large bowl, mix all ingredients except egg whites.
5. In another bowl, beat egg whites until stiff but not dry.
6. Gently fold the egg whites into the pumpkin mixture.
7. Pour filling into prepared pie shells.
8. Bake at 450°F for 15 minutes. Reduce temperature to 375°F and bake an additional 15 minutes. Reduce temperature again to 350°F and bake another 15 minutes, or until a toothpick inserted 2 inches from the edge of the pie comes out clean.
9. Turn off oven; leave pie in the oven with the door slightly open for 20 minutes.
10. Serve warm or cold. Makes 2 pies, 8 servings each.
